hero.description: I am a Web Developer graduated from İnönü University, Department of Computer Engineering. I transformed the theoretical knowledge I gained during my undergraduate studies into practice through various internships and project experiences. By taking active responsibility in projects carried out in corporate environments, I developed both my technical and professional competencies.

about.heading: Who is Gülsüm Sümer?
about.description: I am a Web Developer who graduated from İnönü University Computer Engineering with a 3.19 GPA. Alongside my undergraduate education, I am a student at Atatürk University Social Services department. I developed projects covering frontend and backend processes with React.js, JavaScript, ASP.NET MVC and C# technologies; I worked on an AI-based system in a TÜBİTAK-supported research project. I completed various internships at Sultangazi Municipality, Sca Social and İnönü University, gaining both technical and managerial experience in corporate environments. As a Core Team Member at Google Developer Student Clubs, I organized events and provided mentorship support in software workshops.

techStack.title: My Tech Stack
techStack.description: Selected languages, libraries and tools I use to build seamless digital solutions.

studies.title: FEATURED WORKS
studies.description: Selected works reflecting my technical competencies and professional journey.

items.title: TÜBİTAK 2209-A Research Project
items.desc: A system that automatically detects illegal structures by analyzing urban planning using an AI model trained on 300,000+ satellite images.

items.title: Earthquake Prediction AI Model
items.desc: A project aimed at predicting future earthquakes using an AI model trained with AFAD's historical data.

items.title: Lost Item Tracking System
items.desc: A full-stack web application developed during Sultangazi Municipality internship for managing citizens' lost belongings digitally.

items.title: Organ (IVC) Segmentation via Image Processing
items.desc: Automatically detecting and marking the Inferior Vena Cava region in medical images using image processing techniques.

items.title: To-do List Application
items.desc: A web application for managing daily to-do lists with secure user management via Firebase Authentication.

education.title: Education & Social Responsibility
education.description: A foundation built on formal engineering education and active community mentorship.

items.details: Organized technology events and hackathons within the university, leading technical mentorship and knowledge sharing in software workshops.

works.title: EXPERIENCE
works.description: Practical experiences and professional development across different sectors.

items.details: Led end-to-end full stack development and technical support processes in corporate web applications.
Managed planning, coordination and documentation processes from project management to digital marketing strategies. Designed REST APIs with Node.js and PostgreSQL.

items.org: İnönü University Distance Education and Research Center
items.details: Took full responsibility for video production processes within the university, producing academic-quality content.

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.description: I am someone who constantly renews myself in software development, focused on learning and producing. I am open to new job opportunities, projects and collaborations. Don't hesitate to reach out!

footer.tagline: Software engineer designing and developing scalable web applications for corporate needs.
